hooks.command: bash -lc 'p="$1"; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then p="$(cygpath -u "$p" 2>/dev/null || printf %s "$p")"; fi; exec bash "$p"' _ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hook-prompt-submit.sh"
bash -lc 'p="$1"; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then p="$(cygpath -u "$p" 2>/dev/null || printf %s "$p")"; fi; exec bash "$p"' _ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hook-stop.sh"
bash -lc 'p="$1"; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then p="$(cygpath -u "$p" 2>/dev/null || printf %s "$p")"; fi; exec bash "$p"' _ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hook-subagent-start.sh"
bash -lc 'p="$1"; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then p="$(cygpath -u "$p" 2>/dev/null || printf %s "$p")"; fi; exec bash "$p"' _ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hook-subagent-stop.sh"
